Sports Scene

Copied

The 2024 Paris Summer Olympics will end on Sunday evening and so will CGTN Sports Scene's special program "Meet in Paris" as well as its "Talk Sports" series.

A total of 31 athletes and officials participated in interviews for the "Talk Sports" series focusing on the 2024 Games in Paris. Here are some of the highlights.

title: Who did CGTN Sports Scene talk to during 2024 Paris Summer Olympics? - CGTN
author: CGTN
description: The 2024 Paris Summer Olympics will end on Sunday evening and so will CGTN Sports Scene's special program "Meet in Paris" as well as its "Talk Sports" series.A total of 31 athletes and officials participated in interviews for the "Talk Sports" series
